description_long: This object consists of a roughly rectangular, irregularly shaped slab of stone with a coarse, woven-textured surface. Affixed to the center of the stone is a black Sony PlayStation-style game controller, which appears partially embedded or fused into the stone. The controller is detailed, showing recognizable buttons, joysticks, and branding, and contrasts sharply with the pale, rough stone background. The stone's edges are jagged and uneven, giving it a natural, uncut appearance, while the controller is smooth and glossy. The juxtaposition of the modern plastic controller and the ancient-looking stone creates a striking visual contrast. The object appears to be a sculptural or artistic piece, likely intended as an urban art installation or decorative barrier.
description: A jagged, pale stone slab with a black PlayStation controller embedded in its center, contrasting rough stone with smooth plastic.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full face of the stone slab with the PlayStation controller clearly visible and centered.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thinness of the stone slab and the protrusion of the controller from the surface.
description_view_2: The rear view shows mostly the textured stone surface, with the back of the controller partially visible and embedded.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the slab's thin profile and the controller's partial embedment.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or grass
attribute_pattern: The stone surface has a woven, fabric-like texture with irregular, natural edges; the controller features standard button and joystick patterns.
attribute_weathering: The stone appears rough and unpolished, with no significant signs of lichen or erosion, suggesting moderate weathering; the controller looks slightly worn but intact.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: The stone contrasts sharply with urban elements due to its natural texture, while the embedded controller draws attention and creates a visual focal point, likely standing out from its surroundings.
